arn.description: Amazon Resource Name used for IAM and API operations

cpu_count.description: Number of virtual CPUs allocated to the instance

created_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the instance was created

ipv6_addresses.description: List of IPv6 addresses assigned to the instance

is_static_ip.description: Indicates if the instance has a static IP address

private_ip_address.description: Internal private IP address used within the VPC

public_ip_address.description: Publicly accessible IP address for the instance

ram_size.description: Amount of RAM (in GB) allocated to the instance

username.description: Default username for connecting to the instance
